title: Simple Ghost Block
description: This mod adds Ghost blocks to troll Your friends
body:
Tired of pranks that your friend does to you?

Dont know how to Prank him with devious pranks?

This mod is just for your sake!

> # Simple ghost block
> This mod adds craftable ghost blocks in seconds!
> Works with Every single block!, i think
> 
> **How to craft a ghost block?**: Drop an armorstand and drop any block on it, and then POOF! you will have ur own ghost block you can summon
>
> **What is this used for?**: you can make hidden bases that only you know, or hidden traps that only you can avoid
